name: creating-docs
description: DEPRECATED — superseded by the `knowledge` plugin (>= 0.1.0). Final maintenance release. Create and update project documentation with structured templates and validation tools.

interface.shortDescription: DEPRECATED — superseded by `knowledge`. Structured documentation workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: DEPRECATED — superseded by the `knowledge` plugin (>= 0.1.0), which absorbs this plugin's full surface with behavior-identical ports (doc workflows continue as $knowledge:docs-create / $knowledge:docs-review). This is the final maintenance release; maintenance-only during the deprecation window. A documentation workflow with reusable writing guidance, validation scripts, and an independent read-only reviewer subagent for accuracy checks.
